title: IHL Internship Programme
text:
IHL Internship Programme - SupportGoWhere
IHL Internship Programme
Share link
The SG Enable IHL Internship Programme matches students with disabilities to internships offered by inclusive organisations in various sectors based on their course of study, interests and preferences. Students will learn in a real work environment, build up their professional networks, and gain practical job-related knowledge and skills.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Matches students with disabilities to internships with inclusive employers
Job support provided during the internship
Opportunity to learn in real work environments and build professional networks
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

IHL students with disabilities will receive internship support services such as:

reviewing their resumes;

conducting internship search;

preparing them for interviews;

accompanying them for interviews (sitting in as observer);

advising potential employers on the student’s disabilities and support needs and;

providing job support (either virtual or in-person) during the internship.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Singapore Permanent Residents who have a verified disability status*;

Currently enrolled at an Institute of Higher Learning (IHL)# and

Applicants should have a permanent disability based on any one of the following:
a) Physical Disability: Requires some assistance with at least 1 of the 6 Activities of Daily Living due to physical impairment
b) Moderate visual impairment or worse in the better eye
c) Moderate hearing loss or worse in the better ear
d) Intellectual Disability
e) Autism




*You can check if your disability status is verified on SupportGoWhere by logging with your Singpass or contact us at IHL-to-work@sgenable.sg.




# IHLs refer to autonomous universities, polytechnics, Institute of Technical Education and other arts and private education institutions. 

How to apply?

To register, applicants will need to:

Check if your disability status is verified via SupportGoWhere, or contact us at IHL-to-work@sgenable.sg.

Download and complete the Disability Verification Form (DVF). (To be completed by a relevant registered healthcare professional)
    - Note: Only applicants who do not have a verified disability status will be required to upload the DVF.

Upload the completed DVF as part of the online application on the IHL Internship Programme on SupportGoWhere.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SG Enable hotline: 1800-8585-885

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

IHL-to-work@sgenable.sg

Enabling Village
20 Lengkok Bahru #01-01
159053

Scheme last updated 21 May 2026
